# Xnipertools

> Free online tools, calculators and generators — fast, clean, and no signup. Most tools run entirely in your browser, so your files stay private.

Xnipertools (https://xnipertools.com) is a free web-tools hub. No sign-up, no watermarks forced, no limits. Built mobile-first.

## Image & PDF tools
- [Background Remover](https://xnipertools.com/background-remover/): AI removes a photo's background in your browser; add a solid colour background or download a transparent PNG.
- [Image Compressor & Tools](https://xnipertools.com/image-compressor/): Compress, resize, convert (JPG/PNG/WebP), crop, rotate and flip images.
- [Image to PDF / PDF Tools](https://xnipertools.com/image-to-pdf/): Convert images to PDF, merge, split, and turn PDF pages back into images.
- [Image Upscaler](https://xnipertools.com/image-upscaler/): Enlarge and sharpen images up to 4x.
- [Meme Generator](https://xnipertools.com/meme-generator/): Add multiple draggable text boxes with custom fonts, colours and outlines, plus your own watermark, then download a PNG.
- [QR Code Generator](https://xnipertools.com/qr-code-generator/): Custom QR codes with colours, shapes and a centre logo; PNG and SVG download.

## Text & utility tools
- [Text to Speech](https://xnipertools.com/text-to-speech/): Read any text aloud with multiple device voices, adjustable speed and pitch.
- [Word Counter](https://xnipertools.com/word-counter/): Word, character, reading-time and AI-token counts.
- [Case Converter](https://xnipertools.com/case-converter/): UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case and more.
- [JSON Formatter](https://xnipertools.com/json-formatter/): Beautify, minify and validate JSON.
- [Color Picker](https://xnipertools.com/color-picker/): Colour picker plus CSS gradient and palette generator.
- [Password Generator](https://xnipertools.com/password-generator/): Strong, secure random passwords.
- [Spin the Wheel](https://xnipertools.com/spin-the-wheel/): Random name picker for giveaways and raffles.
- [WhatsApp Link Generator](https://xnipertools.com/whatsapp-link-generator/): Create wa.me click-to-chat links with a prefilled message.
- [Dev Tools](https://xnipertools.com/dev-tools/): Handy developer utilities including a Unix timestamp ↔ date converter.

## Calculators & converters
- [Age Calculator](https://xnipertools.com/age-calculator/): Your exact age in years, months and days.
- [BMI Calculator](https://xnipertools.com/bmi-calculator/): Body Mass Index with an animated gauge (metric & imperial).
- [Percentage Calculator](https://xnipertools.com/percentage-calculator/): Work out percentages, increases, decreases and differences.
- [Loan & EMI Calculator](https://xnipertools.com/loan-calculator/): Monthly EMI, total interest and total payment for any loan.
- [Unit Converter](https://xnipertools.com/unit-converter/): Convert length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, time and data.
- [Currency Converter](https://xnipertools.com/currency-converter/): Live exchange rates for 160+ currencies including PKR.

## Productivity & business
- [Weekly Planner](https://xnipertools.com/weekly-planner/): Plan your week with daily tasks, a habit tracker, progress rings and colour themes; download or print.
- [Invoice Generator](https://xnipertools.com/invoice-generator/): Make a professional invoice with your logo, line items, tax and discount, then download a PDF.
- [Resume / CV Builder](https://xnipertools.com/resume-builder/): Build a clean CV with 10 templates, accent colours and fonts, then download a PDF.
- [Cheat Sheets](https://xnipertools.com/cheat-sheets/): Keyboard shortcuts and Excel formulas for Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Windows, Chrome, Gmail and VS Code; export a PDF.
- [School Tools for Teachers](https://xnipertools.com/school-tools/): Make exam papers, MCQ & OMR sheets, result cards, date sheets, attendance registers, admit cards, timetables, applications and certificates in English, Urdu or Arabic; print or save a PDF.

## Gaming tools (Free Fire)
- [Free Fire Name Generator](https://xnipertools.com/free-fire-name-generator/): Stylish FF names, fonts, symbols and an invisible / blank name.
- [Free Fire Points Calculator](https://xnipertools.com/free-fire-points-calculator/): Tournament points with a downloadable result image.
- [Free Fire Tournament Standings](https://xnipertools.com/free-fire-tournament-standings/): For organizers — auto-rank teams and export a standings image.

## Games
- [Free Online Games](https://xnipertools.com/games/): Play free browser games — no download, no signup — with live leaderboards.

## Guides
- [All Guides](https://xnipertools.com/guides/): Practical explainers with real numbers, worked examples and screenshots.
- [How to Compress Images Without Losing Quality](https://xnipertools.com/guides/how-to-compress-images-without-losing-quality/): Quality sliders, JPG vs WebP, exact settings for web, WhatsApp and forms.
- [Passport Photo Sizes for Every Country](https://xnipertools.com/guides/passport-photo-size-requirements/): Sizes in mm and pixels, background rules, printing 8 on one sheet.
- [How Loan EMI Is Calculated](https://xnipertools.com/guides/how-emi-is-calculated/): The EMI formula with a full worked example and amortization table.
- [Debt Snowball vs Avalanche](https://xnipertools.com/guides/debt-snowball-vs-avalanche/): Both strategies simulated month by month on the same debts.
- [Compound Interest Explained](https://xnipertools.com/guides/compound-interest-explained/): The formula, the Rule of 72, and why starting early wins.
- [QR Code With a Logo](https://xnipertools.com/guides/qr-code-with-logo/): Error correction levels, logo size limits and print-size rules.
- [What Makes a Password Strong](https://xnipertools.com/guides/what-makes-a-password-strong/): The entropy math behind cracking times; length beats symbols.
- [HEIC vs JPG](https://xnipertools.com/guides/heic-vs-jpg/): Why iPhone photos won't open elsewhere and how to convert.
- [ATS-Friendly Resume](https://xnipertools.com/guides/ats-friendly-resume/): Formatting that survives resume-parsing software.
- [Invoicing for Freelancers](https://xnipertools.com/guides/freelance-invoice-guide/): The 9 required fields, payment terms and late-payment escalation.
- [Average Typing Speed](https://xnipertools.com/guides/average-typing-speed/): Real WPM averages and a 4-week improvement plan.
- [Zakat Calculation Guide](https://xnipertools.com/guides/zakat-calculation-guide/): Nisab, zakatable assets and the 2.5% rate with a worked example.

## About
- [Request a Tool](https://xnipertools.com/request-a-tool/): Suggest a new tool.
- [Report a Bug](https://xnipertools.com/report-bug/): Report an issue with any tool.
- [About](https://xnipertools.com/about)
- [Contact](https://xnipertools.com/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://xnipertools.com/privacy)
